description_long: This object is a retro-style arcade game machine with a bold, colorful design. The front features a large screen area, control panel with buttons and joystick, and a coin slot, all framed by a cabinet with the word 'ZYFALOS' prominently displayed at the top and bottom. The side panels are decorated with pixel art graphics of a green tentacled creature and a worm, set against a purple background with pink and orange circular accents. The rear of the machine is plain black with visible ventilation slots and access panels. The cabinet is constructed with a combination of hard materials, likely wood or MDF, and is edged with bright red trim. The overall appearance is vibrant and playful, evoking classic arcade aesthetics.
description: A retro arcade game machine with bold pixel art graphics, a large screen, and a colorful cabinet labeled 'ZYFALOS'. The sides feature green tentacled creatures and the front has a control panel and coin slot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, control panel with buttons and joystick, coin slot, and 'ZYFALOS' signage.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the pixel art of a green tentacled creature and worm on a purple background.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain black panel, ventilation slots, and access panels, no decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with matching pixel art graphics and color scheme.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign integrated into the structure, 'ZYFALOS' text at the top and bottom front panels.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with slight overhang, edged in red trim, constructed from the same material as the cabinet.
attribute_architectural_style: Retro arcade, inspired by 1980s gaming aesthetics with pixel art and bold colors.
